rawAssistant: One good thing came of that midnight rain: cleaned up some nasty messes along our canals. Still, I'll need to inspect those fresh signs on the side road myself. Nothing like a little mud and debris to tell a story. Care to join me while we look closer? My boots are sturdy; yours... well, you're already covered in travel grime, it seems.
